utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Now check the final solution: it includes property (with details and price), financing (solution with terms), legal_services (with costs), moving_services (with costs), setup_services (utility and setup services), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Each appears fully specified according to its item description: property has details and price; financing has solution and terms; legal_services has package and costs; moving_services has type and costs; setup_services lists utilities and setup items; total_budget provides breakdown and totals.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes selections across categories: purchase property 'New Build', financing 'Traditional Mortgage', legal services 'Basic Legal Package', moving services 'Standard Moving', and setup services that map to 'New Build Inspection', 'Basic Survey', 'Premium Utilities' (premium utilities setup), and 'Basic Utilities'.
